conversation.content: Let's have a math class. Today we are going to learn about the form of the guild bank deposit interest calculation formula in economic calculations in the world of Azeroth. It is different from conventional mathematical formulas in the real world and has a more fantasy flair.
My notebook is ready, let's begin.
In this world, the core formula specification for the guild bank deposit interest calculation is: its form is I = G × (0.02 + A / 1000) × D.
I have noted down this specification.
This formula can be used to solve for the guild bank deposit interest I when the deposit principal G, the guild activity level A, and the deposit days D are known.
Okay, I understand the application scenario of this specification.
